passages.name: begin
passages.content:
You (Liam) always were a livid dreamer. Most of the times you had some form of control over your dreams.
One night however, you find yourself dreaming a little bit too real.
This is where your story begins

passages.name: your story begins
passages.content: It was a clear starry night. You find yourself wandering through the woods "How did I get here?" you say to yourself. "Oh right... probably a dream" [image: Scenes/Intro/Dreamforest01.png] You look around you and recognise the place. Just over the hill you find yourself a lake. "That's lovers lake! I've been here before." Then... suddenly, a large bang. You look up and see a small meteorite flying through the sky. [image: Scenes/Intro/Dreamforest02.png] It crashes at the other side of the lake. You're interested. At first you started walking around the lake but then you remembered it was a dream and you ran across the water towards where the rock crashed into the dirt. "Cool" you think to yourself As you arrive at the crash site you see that the ground is glowing near a crooked birch tree. You go over there and pick up the rock with your bare hands You drop it again for it is icy cold "But how? It was burning through the skies just a second ago" You take off your shirt and wrap it around the rock before picking it up again. Now the rock doesn't burn your hands. You get back home and try to sell the rock to a witch walking by. You vaguely recognise this 'witch' [image: Characters/Emily/WitchCostumePose01.png] It's Emily, she was dressed as a witch last halloween You know Emily since kindergarten. You were never really friends but somehow ended up in the same class each year. You would describe Emily as an average girl. Emily wants to buy the rock for 150.000 euros "Deal" you eagerly say. Next thing you know you're in your mansion in the backyard. You see a swimming pool and decide to jump in immediately. After you take a leap. You seem to keep falling... and falling... You're really scared now. The water just isn't getting any closer "Now wait a minute" you think to yourself "this isn't fun. I think I'm done. I want to wake up now" You try... Path $RandomNumber out of 2 And it doesn't work... you look around\ And succeed you wake up

You wake up with the feeling that you're still falling
"Oh god" You feel motionsick but you're happy to wake up in your own bedroom again.
that was such a weird dream
You do your morning routine and head off to school. Still remembering that vague dream.

	
		
At the end of the day you decide to study a little more. However when you went to the bus stop you just missed the last bus home.
		
At the end of the day you find out your car has run out of gas.
		
At the end of the day you find out your bike is stolen.
	

Guess you'll have to walk home

The curiousity gets the better of you and you decide to investigate

You put the rock in your backpack, wich lucky for your books always contains a plastic bag.

passages.name: A woman opens the door
passages.content: You recognise the woman as Marcella, Mark's twin sister. [image: Characters/Marcella/Scene/MorningYawn.png] She yawns agressively. As she looks you up and down her morning crogginess seems to fade. "Liam? Is that you?" You knew Marcella a while before she went out of town to a different school. She always was the smarter twin of the two. You had a small crush on her for a while and actually used to buddy up with Mark to get closer to her. But as your friendship with Mark grew your crush on her faded. You still really like her but you see a bit too much of your best friend in her. "Oh ehm, hi Marcella. I'm sorry to disturb you so early. Is Mark in?" "Oh no worries. Eh, no. Mark is out. Not sure where he went, probably to the store to get some groceries. I kinda dropped by unexpected late last night" "Oh can I ask why?" "Yeah you can, but hurry in, it's kinda cold in the door" You step inside

passages.name: You step inside
passages.content:
Once inside Marcella quickly gets past you and hurries over to the sofa.
She grabs a duvet and pillow from the couch (she clearly spend the night on) and throws them into what you know to be Mark's bedroom.
"Ah, so you really just dropped in unexpected?" You break the ice
"Ehm, yeah, kinda like you right now. Want anything to drink?"
"No thanks"
She grabs a drink for herself anyways.
"Yeah, no, I just finished the semester and have a week off so I thought I'd spend at least the weekend with Mark. Allthough he didn't really like me dropping in unannounced at midnight on a friday eve"

"No wait Cosmos I-"
Marcella quickly grabs the rock
"Hohoho, nonono. I wanna see what kind of 'mistake' you made. This'll be great"
"Crap! Just give it back!"
You reach for it but she evades you.
"Stop it, I didn't realise you're such a kid, Liam"
"Aargh, fine. Enjoy the show I guess"
"Hey, looks like your head is at least human shaped again. Wait..."
"What?"
"Are you turning brown?"
You look at your arms
"Oh my god, you are. Oh damn, even your eye color changed"
"Oh wow, chestnut looks weirdly fitting for a bunny"
As you say it the fur starts receeding and your fluff dissappears
